judge_result.notes: Artefact aligns with the description: a one-shot markdown report covering process tree, MCP servers, orphans, and total memory. Tables are well-formed and the orphan warning plus Codex informational note add useful context. The third judge criterion text was truncated in the prompt, so it was assessed against the canonical sections implied by the skill description; all expected sections are present.
